name: MergeDailyBuildBranch
description: Builds and updates a daily-build branch by merging active pull requests to main.
helpMarkDown: Uses Merge-DailyBuildBranch.ps1 to create and push a consolidated daily-build branch. [help](https://github.com/BE-terna/D365-GitOps-MPL/blob/main/azure-devops-extension/tasks/Merge-DailyBuildBranch/overview.md)
author: BE-terna

inputs.name: dailyBuildBranch
inputs.label: Daily build branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target branch name that receives merged pull requests.

inputs.name: defaultPriority
inputs.label: Default priority
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fallback priority when no priority:x label exists.

inputs.name: skipUnchangedPush
inputs.label: Skip push when unchanged
inputs.helpMarkDown: Skip force-push if target branch content is unchanged.
